meaning: n.牧地,草原,牧场v.放牧,牧(牛、羊)等,吃草
examples: The cattle were put out to pasture.
The cows are out now, grazing in the pasture.
It was absolutely essential to separate crops from the areas that animals used as pasture.
But sheep ranchers already have more sheep pasture than they know what to do with.
Luka, the town butcher, owned the pasture and the smokehouse on the edge of town.
